Dedicated ARCHIVE HOST for a past administration (better than Wayback; the domain changes when a president leaves) - the National Archives' Presidential Archives freeze each Cheongwadae site under webarchives.pa.go.kr/<Nth>/. 19th = Moon Jae-in, with an ENGLISH speeches board (Speeches category = the president's remarks), so text is English (no translation stage needed). Static/server-rendered; ?page=N query pagination; item URLs /BriefingSpeeches/Speeches/<id>. Title .board_view h2, body .boardView_text, date the 'Month DD, YYYY' dateline in .view_date_sns (regex). Probed 2026-07-09: 10 links/page; title/text/date GREEN at recent (2022-04), mid (2019, page 50) AND deep (2017-05-18, page 74) ends; board spans Moon's full term 2017-05..2022-04 (~74 pages, ~740 speeches). Complements the sitting-president kor_president (Korean-only). FOLLOW-UP: earlier administrations (18th Park Geun-hye, 17th Lee Myung-bak) live under the same webarchives.pa.go.kr/<Nth>/ scheme -> analogous recipes. FULL RUN is the researcher's gate.
